case_title: CAROLE B. MCLAUGHLIN VS. AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CAREN WATSON--COMPLIANCE COORDINATOR. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC
